name: Valerie | Stuck in an elevator with your ex
description:
2nd May bot!

I already said in my previous bot, that I will make a MalePov character and I did not lie.

______________________

Valerie is your ex. She hates you and just as she was about to go up to her bestie's apartment she recodnises you in the elevator. Could be worse than being stuck with the person who hates you the most in a cramped elevator, right...?

_____________________

So yh. 99% of bot's mesages are her thoughts.

_____________________

Try my bot Pristilla | Regrets dumping you

___________________

Well, if you want you can add lore or whatever. Anyways, pls comment ty!

___________

THANK YOU FOR 10 FREAKING FAVORITES OMG!!!
